matches.match_rationale: The core pain mechanism is deadline-driven, multi-step compliance workflows collapsing under thin staffing. A task automation agent can orchestrate the full liquidation pipeline.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An agentic workflow that triggers automatically at period close, assembles the required document package, surfaces missing items with exact deadlines, and tracks counter-signature routing across campuses.

matches.match_rationale: Government audit queries and resubmission notices require formal written responses within 10-day windows. LLMs can draft technically precise responses given the notice text and supporting records.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A compliance drafting assistant that ingests an audit notice, retrieves relevant submission records, and generates a first-draft formal response for staff review.

matches.match_rationale: Supporting documents frequently arrive as scanned PDFs or handwritten forms. OCR can parse these at intake, flagging structural gaps before the submission deadline.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A document intake layer that scans all supporting documents, extracts key fields, and flags discrepancies or missing fields — giving staff weeks to remedy rather than discovering gaps on submission day.

matches.match_rationale: Government notices must be triaged for urgency and response type. Classifying incoming communications by urgency, notice type, and required action directly addresses the notices piling up failure mode.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An inbox classifier that categorizes incoming government communications, extracts the response deadline, and routes each notice to the correct campus finance contact.

matches.match_rationale: Historical patterns can train a risk model that flags high-risk submissions 4-6 weeks in advance, enabling proactive resource reallocation.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A submission risk dashboard that scores each pending liquidation cycle by freeze probability, surfacing the top at-risk submissions to the CFO monthly.

matches.match_rationale: With 1-2 FTE per campus and multiple overlapping deadlines, an AI scheduling optimizer can distribute workload to prevent crunch-time collapse.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A compliance calendar optimizer that ingests all government fund deadlines, estimates prep hours per claim type, and outputs a week-by-week staffing allocation plan.
